source: Business → Individual (B2C) Scenario Pack (illustrative, non-exhaustive · not legal advice · counsel review required) · Mal-CRAM-US-01 v2.3 (CRAM-US-2026-07-FREEZE-03) · MAL-TA-01 v1.0 · MSB Compliance Risk Typology Register (Draft v0.1) · MAL-TM-PPC-CATALOG v1.0 (B2C, 16 purpose codes)
note: A Global-Accounts business ENTITY (established in one of the nine permitted corridor jurisdictions, holding a US account) pays out to individuals (B2C). The customer scored is the entity — three axes that don't exist for individuals become primary: legal entity type, ownership resolved to natural-person UBOs, and the §6.4 prohibited-business-type screen (G2, before any KYB). Individual payees are screened as beneficiaries. Establishment is the gate; the entity structure is the second gate; the payee is the third screened node. Guidance only; the customer rating is set by the CRAM composite.

scenarios.title: Pakistani textile-export LLC — payroll + contractor payout (workable, High/EDD)
scenarios.profile: General-trading/export LLC in Pakistan employing a local workforce; pays salaries and occasional contractor invoices; expects USD receipts + B2C payouts to individuals.
scenarios.segment: Trading/export SME (High) + employer · LLC · 2 UBOs both resident PK, each >25%, no nominees; ownership resolves to natural persons; UBO certification held
scenarios.geography: Establishment PK (permitted, passes G0) · UBOs PK nationals · SoW = business profits · SoF = trade receipts
scenarios.flow: B2C-01 salary to registered employees; B2C-08 freelancer/contractor payout against invoice
scenarios.corridor: US→PK / PK-domestic High (EWRA override); corridor-concentration floor → High
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO sanctions/PEP/adverse-media clear; payees (employees/contractors) screened
scenarios.rating: High — EDD mandatory (corridor), not because of the entity
scenarios.documents: KYB: incorporation, active trade licence, registry extract, shareholder register, UBO ID+PoA (25%+ & controller), UBO certification. Additional: employee roster + labour contracts; contractor invoices + permit; audited/management accounts + bank statements; beneficiary coherence (name–ID–IBAN)
scenarios.expectedActivity: Salaries on payroll cadence to a stable roster; contractor payouts matching invoices; payouts proportionate to turnover
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Ghost-employee fan-out; payroll to non-employees; salary amounts inconsistent with headcount/turnover; contractor fan-out mimicking payroll (TYP-PK-002/003); fictitious-invoice payout (OS-TM-032)
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High/EDD. UBO unresolved → refuse; over/under-invoicing or ghost-payroll → decline/exit + SAR

scenarios.title: Pakistani 'consultancy' LLC — commission/contractor payout with no sales linkage (kickback)
scenarios.profile: Services/consultancy LLC paying large commissions and 'contractor' fees to individuals with no evidence of underlying sales or deliverables; some payees PEP-linked.
scenarios.segment: Services/consultancy SME (High) · LLC · single UBO · thin substance (no premises/utilities footprint)
scenarios.geography: Establishment PK · UBO PK · SoW/SoF opaque
scenarios.flow: B2C-09 commission / B2C-08 contractor payout to individuals
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High; TYP-PK-003 fake-service; corruption overlay
scenarios.screening: Entity clear on lists but adverse-media/shell markers; PEP screening of commission payees → corruption overlay
scenarios.rating: High → decline on confirmed kickback / no-substance
scenarios.documents: Agency/commission agreement + underlying-sales linkage; deliverable evidence; PEP screening of beneficiaries; substance evidence (premises/utilities/employees)
scenarios.expectedActivity: Commissions tied to documented sales; contractor payouts with deliverables
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Commission-to-revenue ratio implausible; no sales linkage; PEP-linked payees; consulting-fee share of outflows dominant
scenarios.outcome: EDD; decline + SAR on no-substance / kickback

scenarios.title: Pakistani entity with a nominee director & opaque offshore holding — unresolvable UBO (refuse)
scenarios.profile: LLC whose registered director is a nominee; ownership runs through an opaque offshore holding; UBO not disclosed. Wants to run B2C payouts.
scenarios.segment: Any — the structure drives it · LLC · nominee director · offshore holding layer · UBO NOT identifiable
scenarios.geography: Establishment PK · UBO unknown
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High; but structure fails before corridor scoring
scenarios.screening: Cannot complete — UBO not identifiable; nominee/front markers
scenarios.rating: Refuse (Priority-1) — a hard refusal, not a High rating
scenarios.documents: The AI first requests the full ownership chart to natural persons + nominee-resolution evidence; if unresolved within the RFI window → refuse
scenarios.expectedActivity: N/A
scenarios.behaviourWatch: N/A at onboarding. For an existing customer where a nominee/front later surfaces → freeze + exit
scenarios.sarPosture: Nominee-front / structural opacity — refuse; SAR if surfaced on an existing relationship
scenarios.outcome: Refuse on unresolved UBO (§6.2, Priority-1)

scenarios.title: Pakistani LLC with a Lebanese UBO whose SoW traces to Lebanon — restricted-country UBO (Rule 1)
scenarios.profile: PK-established trading LLC; controlling UBO is a Lebanese national whose source of wealth originates in Lebanon; pays PK employees/contractors.
scenarios.segment: Trading SME (High) + restricted-country-UBO overlay · LLC · controlling UBO Lebanese (restricted, non-OFAC) · other UBO PK · resolves to natural persons
scenarios.geography: Establishment PK (permitted) · UBO nationality LB · UBO SoW = Lebanon · entity SoF = PK trade receipts
scenarios.flow: B2C-01 salary / B2C-08 contractor payout to PK individuals; no Lebanon payee/corridor
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High + restricted-country-UBO screening; Lebanon corridor/payee blocked
scenarios.screening: Lebanese UBO → screening escalation + Rule 1 on the Lebanon-origin SoW; entity/other nodes clear
scenarios.rating: High floor (restricted-country UBO SoW, Rule 1) — documented UBO SoW/SoF, nexus screening, senior approval
scenarios.documents: Full KYB; for the Lebanese UBO: documentary SoW (Lebanese company licence/financials/dividends) + how proceeds left Lebanon (remittance receipts) + restricted-country nexus screening + senior-approval record; confirm no Lebanon payee
scenarios.expectedActivity: PK-payroll/contractor payouts; UBO capital evidenced
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any Lebanon payee/corridor (→ reject); unexplained UBO top-ups from Lebanon
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High-floor EDD, senior sign-off; Lebanon payees/corridor disabled. Unevidenced UBO SoW → hold then decline

scenarios.title: Pakistani unlicensed 'lending' business — loan disbursement to individuals (prohibited use)
scenarios.profile: Entity disbursing 'loans' to many individuals without a lending licence; pass-through shape.
scenarios.segment: Purported lender (unlicensed) — an unregistered MSB / unlicensed-lending concern · LLC / sole establishment · UBO resident PK
scenarios.geography: Establishment PK · UBO PK
scenarios.corridor: US→PK High; unlicensed-lending / pass-through typology
scenarios.screening: Licence-verification hard gate fails; entity may be an unregistered MSB (§6.4 override)
scenarios.rating: Decline + escalate (unlicensed lending / unregistered money transmission)
scenarios.documents: Licence verification is a hard gate; unlicensed = decline + review account purpose
scenarios.expectedActivity: Only a licensed lender may disburse loans
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Serial disbursements to many individuals; loan-back round-trips; pass-through
scenarios.sarPosture: Unlicensed lending / unregistered MSB → decline + SAR/escalate
scenarios.outcome: Decline + escalate + SAR

scenarios.title: Egyptian import/export LLC — contractor payouts with invoicing anomalies (TBML-adjacent)
scenarios.profile: EG trading company paying individual contractors; declared services/values don't reconcile with deliverables; some parallel-FX-timed payouts.
scenarios.segment: Trading SME (High) · LLC · 2–3 shareholders resolving to natural persons · UBO certification held
scenarios.geography: Establishment EG (grey-list) · UBOs EG · SoW/SoF = business income
scenarios.corridor: US→EG High — TBML, parallel-FX via payout, charity-channel typologies
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO/payee screened
scenarios.rating: High; decline if payouts have no lawful economic purpose
scenarios.documents: KYB pack; contractor invoices + deliverable evidence; payroll roster; for any trade leg: commercial invoices, bills of lading, customs docs; reconciliation against declared flows
scenarios.expectedActivity: Contractor payouts matching deliverables; salaries to a stable roster
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Round-sum 'contractor' payouts no deliverable; payout timing to FX gaps; over/under-stated values
scenarios.sarPosture: No lawful economic purpose / TBML → SAR; decline
scenarios.outcome: Onboard High/EDD if it reconciles; decline + SAR on mismatch

scenarios.title: Egyptian charity / NGO — declined at G2 (prohibited business type)
scenarios.profile: A charity/NGO/religious association seeking to run B2C 'assistance' payouts to individuals.
scenarios.segment: Charity/NGO — prohibited business type (§6.4)
scenarios.geography: Establishment EG
scenarios.corridor: US→EG High; but prohibited-type stops before corridor scoring
scenarios.screening: Prohibited-type screen at G2 fires before any KYB
scenarios.documents: None — no document rescues a prohibited business type
scenarios.expectedActivity: N/A
scenarios.behaviourWatch: N/A. (An individual's charity remittances are handled under the C2C pack with TF EDD; the ENTITY is declined here.)
scenarios.outcome: Decline at G2 (charities/NGOs prohibited)

scenarios.title: Turkish services LLC — contractor payout to sanctions-adjacent individuals (dual-use adjacency)
scenarios.profile: TR services/technology LLC paying individual contractors, some adjacent to sanctioned networks; dual-use context.
scenarios.segment: Services SME (High on the adjacency) · LLC · clean single UBO resident TR · resolves to natural person
scenarios.geography: Establishment TR · UBO TR · SoW/SoF = business income
scenarios.corridor: US→TR Medium — dual-use/sanctions-evasion adjacency; EDD mandatory
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO clear; PAYEE screening for sanctions adjacency is the crux; adverse media
scenarios.documents: KYB pack; contractor invoices + permit; export-control/sanctions screening of the payee set; end-use context where dual-use
scenarios.expectedActivity: Contractor payouts to screened, non-adjacent individuals
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Payees adjacent to sanctioned networks; unusual routing; dual-use context
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, EDD if payees clear; escalate/decline on sanctions-adjacent payees

scenarios.title: Bangladeshi garment SME — payroll to a large workforce (ghost-worker watch)
scenarios.profile: BD garment-manufacturing SME running payroll to a mostly-migrant workforce; some contractor fan-out.
scenarios.segment: Employer + trading SME (Medium–High) · LLC · UBOs resident BD · ownership resolves to natural persons
scenarios.geography: Establishment BD · UBOs BD · SoW/SoF = manufacturing income
scenarios.corridor: US→BD Medium — ghost-worker payroll, garment-TBML adjacency, remittance-velocity via salary label
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO/payee screened
scenarios.documents: KYB pack; verified employee roster reconciled to payroll; labour contracts; headcount plausibility; contractor invoices
scenarios.expectedActivity: Payroll matching a verified roster; payouts proportionate to declared headcount/turnover
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Payroll names ≠ roster; salaries funnelled to a common account (mule cluster); payroll >> declared headcount (ghost workers at scale); remittance-velocity via 'salary' label
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium–High. Watch ghost-worker fan-out and salary-funnel to a common account → SAR

scenarios.title: Indonesian e-commerce partnership — refunds to customers (refund-laundering watch)
scenarios.profile: ID online-retail partnership issuing B2C refunds to individual customers; some via e-wallet.
scenarios.segment: Merchant/platform (Medium) · Partnership/LLP · partners resolve to natural persons · partner register held
scenarios.geography: Establishment ID · partners ID · SoW/SoF = marketplace revenue
scenarios.flow: B2C-11 refund to customer; B2C-08 contractor payout
scenarios.corridor: US→ID Medium — refund laundering, e-wallet mule, VA-linked payout
scenarios.screening: Entity/partners/payee screened
scenarios.documents: KYB pack; pairing of each refund to an original inbound sale (systemic); refund-ratio baseline; e-wallet beneficiary coherence
scenarios.expectedActivity: Refunds paired to prior sales, proportionate to sales volume
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Refunds with no matching sale (refund laundering); refund fan-out to unrelated individuals; refunds >> sales
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium with refund-pairing monitoring; SAR on unpaired refund fan-out

scenarios.title: Filipino promotions company — prize / promotion payout (scam-cover watch)
scenarios.profile: PH company running promotions and paying 'prizes' to individuals; some payouts look like disguised transfers.
scenarios.segment: Promotions/services (High on prize payout) · Corporation/LLC · UBOs resolve to natural persons
scenarios.geography: Establishment PH · UBOs PH · SoW/SoF = business income
scenarios.flow: B2C-15 prize / promotion payout to individuals
scenarios.corridor: US→PH Medium — lottery-scam typology; TF cover; e-wallet mule
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO/payee screened; beneficiary caps
scenarios.documents: KYB pack; promotion permit/authority registration; beneficiary caps + frequency caps; payee coherence
scenarios.expectedActivity: Registered promotions with a permit; capped, occasional payouts to genuine winners
scenarios.behaviourWatch: 'Prizes' as disguised transfers; prize-payout fan-out; scam-pattern; no permit
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High with permit + caps; decline/SAR on scam-pattern or no permit

scenarios.title: Filipino gaming / POGO operator — declined at G2 (prohibited business type)
scenarios.profile: A gaming/casino/POGO operator seeking to run B2C payouts to individuals.
scenarios.segment: Gaming — prohibited business type (§6.4)
scenarios.geography: Establishment PH
scenarios.corridor: US→PH Medium; prohibited-type stops before corridor scoring
scenarios.screening: Prohibited-type screen at G2 fires before any KYB
scenarios.documents: None — no document rescues a prohibited business type
scenarios.expectedActivity: N/A
scenarios.behaviourWatch: N/A
scenarios.outcome: Decline at G2 (gaming/casinos prohibited)

scenarios.title: Saudi contracting JSC — commission to individual agents (PEP / corruption overlay)
scenarios.profile: SA joint-stock company paying commissions to individual agents/introducers; some payees state-linked or PEP-adjacent.
scenarios.segment: Services/contracting SME (High on commission) · JSC · layered shareholding resolved to natural-person UBOs; board resolution + shareholder list held
scenarios.geography: Establishment SA · UBOs SA · SoW/SoF = business income
scenarios.flow: B2C-09 commission / agent payout to individuals
scenarios.corridor: US→SA Medium — commission-to-PEP, state-contractor payout, corruption overlay
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO screened; PEP/state-linked screen of the payee set is mandatory; adverse media
scenarios.rating: Medium, escalating to High if commission payees are PEP-linked
scenarios.documents: KYB pack (incl. board resolution, shareholder list); commission agreement + sales linkage; PEP screening of beneficiaries; commission-to-revenue ratio
scenarios.expectedActivity: Commissions tied to documented sales; payees screened
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Commission with no sales linkage (kickback); PEP-linked payees; state-contractor payment patterns
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium; High + corroboration + senior sign-off if PEP-linked; decline/SAR on kickback

scenarios.title: Saudi LLC with a Yemeni UBO — restricted-country UBO (Rule 1), payroll to individuals
scenarios.profile: SA-established LLC; one UBO is a Yemeni national with partial SoW from Yemen; pays SA employees.
scenarios.segment: Employer / trading SME (High) + restricted-country-UBO overlay · LLC · UBOs = SA national + Yemeni national (restricted, non-OFAC) · resolves to natural persons
scenarios.geography: Establishment SA (permitted) · UBO nationality YE · UBO SoW = partial Yemen · entity SoF = SA income
scenarios.flow: B2C-01 salary to SA employees; no Yemen payee/corridor
scenarios.corridor: US→SA Medium + restricted-country-UBO screening; Yemen payee/corridor blocked
scenarios.screening: Yemeni UBO → screening escalation + Rule 1 on Yemen-origin SoW; entity/other nodes clear
scenarios.rating: High floor (restricted-country UBO SoW, Rule 1) — documented UBO SoW, nexus screening, senior approval
scenarios.documents: Full KYB; Yemeni UBO SoW: documentary origin + how proceeds left Yemen (remittance receipts) + nexus screening + senior-approval record; confirm no Yemen payee
scenarios.expectedActivity: SA-payroll to a stable roster; UBO capital evidenced
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any Yemen payee/corridor (→ reject); unexplained UBO top-ups from Yemen
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, High-floor EDD, senior sign-off; Yemen payees disabled. Unevidenced UBO SoW → hold then decline

scenarios.title: Jordanian services LLC — 'prize/assistance' payout to conflict-adjacency individuals (TF watch)
scenarios.profile: JO company making prize/assistance payouts to individuals, some in conflict-adjacent regions; cash-intensive.
scenarios.segment: Services (High on TF exposure) · LLC · UBOs resident JO · resolves to natural persons
scenarios.geography: Establishment JO · UBOs JO · SoW/SoF = business income
scenarios.flow: B2C-15 prize / B2C-16 'assistance' payout to individuals
scenarios.corridor: US→JO Medium-High — conflict-adjacency TF/NPO, cash-intensive, charity channels; enhanced EDD
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO screened; PAYEE + region screening for TF; adverse media
scenarios.rating: High / enhanced EDD; TF indicators → rapid reporting
scenarios.documents: KYB pack; promotion permit (if prize); payee identity + purpose; region/beneficiary TF screening; caps
scenarios.expectedActivity: Permit-backed, capped payouts to screened individuals in permitted regions
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Payouts to conflict-adjacent individuals; small-value aggregation-then-forward; cash-intensive; no permit
scenarios.outcome: Enhanced EDD; decline + STR on conflict-adjacent / no-permit payouts

scenarios.title: UAE free-zone company (FZE) — WPS payroll to a workforce (workable, ghost-employee watch)
scenarios.profile: UAE free-zone company running WPS-aligned payroll to employees (many PK/BD/PH nationals) plus contractor payouts.
scenarios.segment: Employer / services SME (Medium–High) · FZE · single/clean UBO resident UAE · free-zone licence + establishment card · genuine substance
scenarios.geography: Establishment AE (permitted) · UBO UAE-resident · SoW/SoF = business income
scenarios.corridor: UAE domestic Medium; register rates UAE a Critical hub for onward flows — watch chaining
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO/payee screened
scenarios.documents: KYB: free-zone trade licence, incorporation, establishment card, UBO ID/PoA/certification, bank statements. Additional: employee roster reconciled to the WPS SIF; labour contracts; contractor invoices; beneficiary coherence
scenarios.expectedActivity: WPS payroll matching a verified roster; contractor payouts matching invoices
scenarios.behaviourWatch: WPS names ≠ roster; salaries funnelled to a common account; clustered financing/payout draws; free-zone-shell-with-no-substance
scenarios.outcome: Onboard, Medium–High. Watch ghost-employee WPS fan-out and salary-funnel → SAR

scenarios.title: UAE free-zone shell — no substance, circular invoicing, contractor fan-out (decline)
scenarios.profile: Free-zone entity with no real substance, circular invoicing, paying individual 'contractors' with no deliverables; same customer using multiple MSBs/wallets for one route.
scenarios.segment: Holding/shell (High) · FZE · thin/no substance · UBO resolvable but no economic footprint
scenarios.geography: Establishment AE · UBO varies
scenarios.corridor: UAE domestic Medium; free-zone shell (typology 52), fictitious-invoice
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO screened; adverse-media/shell markers
scenarios.documents: Substance evidence (premises, utilities, employees); contractor invoices + deliverables; if no substance / circular invoicing → decline
scenarios.expectedActivity: Genuine operating payouts with substance
scenarios.behaviourWatch: No substance; circular invoicing; contractor fan-out no deliverable; multi-MSB routing for one route
scenarios.sarPosture: No lawful economic purpose → decline/exit + SAR
scenarios.outcome: Decline/exit + SAR

scenarios.title: UAE LLC — dividend to a non-shareholder individual (hidden-ownership signal)
scenarios.profile: UAE LLC paying 'dividends' to individuals who are not on the shareholder registry, or dividends >> plausible profits.
scenarios.segment: Trading/holding SME (Medium–High) · LLC · shareholder registry held · UBO chain on file
scenarios.geography: Establishment AE · UBOs UAE/mixed
scenarios.corridor: UAE domestic Medium; TM scenario 5.23 ownership-inconsistency
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO/payee screened; shareholder-registry match is a hard control
scenarios.documents: Shareholder-registry match (ties to UBO data); profit plausibility; board resolution for the distribution
scenarios.expectedActivity: Dividends only to registry-verified shareholders, proportionate to profits
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Dividends to non-shareholders (hidden-ownership); dividends >> plausible profits; control-vs-declared mismatch
scenarios.sarPosture: Hidden ownership / disguised distribution → SAR; UBO refresh
scenarios.outcome: Proceed for registry-matched shareholders; escalate/SAR + UBO refresh on mismatch

scenarios.title: UAE entity — payout to a sanctioned / onward-Iran individual (block)
scenarios.profile: UAE entity attempting a B2C payout to an individual who is sanctioned or an onward-to-Iran conduit; dual-use context.
scenarios.segment: Any — irrelevant · any legal type
scenarios.geography: Establishment AE (permitted) BUT sanctioned/onward-Iran nexus on the payee side
scenarios.flow: Any B2C payout to a sanctioned / Iran-nexus individual
scenarios.corridor: Iran comprehensively sanctioned — any nexus blocks (CRAM §7.1)
scenarios.screening: G1 fails — sanctioned payee node
scenarios.documents: None — no document cures a sanctioned nexus
scenarios.expectedActivity: N/A
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Any sanctioned/onward-Iran payee on an existing customer → block
scenarios.sarPosture: Block + SAR; OFAC blocking report within 10 business days
scenarios.outcome: Block + SAR + OFAC report

scenarios.title: Licensed VASP / crypto exchange (any corridor) as an end-user — B2C payouts to individual users
scenarios.profile: A genuinely licensed, directly-onboarded VASP/exchange paying individual users (withdrawals/refunds).
scenarios.segment: Regulated FI (High, permitted-with-EDD) · directly onboarded end-user · NOT a shell bank / nested / 3rd-party processor
scenarios.geography: Establishment = a permitted corridor · UBO chain resolved
scenarios.corridor: Corridor-scored; §6.3 FI taxonomy; §12 Priority-3 High floor pending EDD
scenarios.screening: Entity/UBO screened; Travel-Rule capability; programme attestations
scenarios.documents: Wolfsberg DDQ; valid licence; AML/sanctions programme + screening attestations; Travel-Rule capability (data-survival tested). Shell banks, nested relationships, domestic correspondents, 3rd-party payment processors are PROHIBITED
scenarios.expectedActivity: User payouts consistent with a licensed exchange's operations
scenarios.behaviourWatch: Weak programme; missing Travel-Rule capability; nested/3rd-party structure
scenarios.outcome: Onboard High/EDD on a clean programme; decline on weak controls / missing Travel-Rule capability / prohibited FI structure
